name: dora-nis2-crosswalk-mcp
title: Dora Nis2 Crosswalk Mcp
description: DORA × NIS2 Crosswalk MCP — map Regulation (EU) 2022/2554 obligations to Directive (EU) 2022/2555 Article 21-23 measures, and vice versa. For EU banks, insurers, payment institutions, crypto-asset service providers, and their CTPPs (critical ICT third-party providers). Dual-compliance scoring + HMAC-signed attestations. By MEOK AI Labs.
